## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Aida's role, company growth plans, and potential opportunities for her involvement in GrowthX Labs' expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs raised $12M Series A, planning to hire 106 people by year-end (92 in client delivery)](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Company aims for $22M ARR by EOY, with plans to diversify content offerings beyond SEO](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Aida's performance is excellent; opportunities for her to contribute to training, SOPs, and new work streams](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Pod structure and workload distribution need optimization for scaling (4-8 accounts per pod suggested)](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)

## Topics

### Series A Funding and Rapid Growth Plans

  - [$12M raised in Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Hiring 106 people by year-end, 92 in client delivery roles](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Current team of \~17 to grow to 60 by May](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [65 deals in pipeline, holding back on kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Goal: $22M ARR by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### Pod Structure and Workload Optimization

  - [Current setup: Aida manages 4 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Ideal pod structure discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [1 account manager handling 4 accounts (20 mins/draft review)](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [Support roles: editor, designer, publisher](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Considering 6-8 accounts per pod with 3 full-time staff](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Weekly client meetings may be adjusted for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

### Content Strategy and New Work Streams

  - [Desire to expand beyond SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Interest in developing white papers and industry reports](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Potential for high-value content ($200-500K for industry reports)](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Need for specialized workflows for complex content types](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### Aida's Role and Growth Opportunities

  - [Aida excelling in current role](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

      - [Developing SOPs for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [Training and onboarding new hires](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [Strategic work with clients](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [Supporting new work streams (e.g., white papers)](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Company Expansion and New Hires

  - [Two managing directors joining:](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [Jacob: ex-G2, ActiveCampaign, Softr](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [Dave: ex-TripAdvisor, Fanatics (drove $400M/year in SEO revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [High volume of job applications (3000+)](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Referral program for employees who recommend successful hires](https://fathom.video/share/_gHck3sU9hnsypb551KXf-XKrwpgnKNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
